view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for identity verification is satisfied as per the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for identity verification, which includes ID upload and facial recognition, as outlined in the linked use case. The scenario explicitly mentions that during the check-in process, ID verification and facial matching are performed, confirming that the requirement is met. This is supported by the detailed description in the linked use case, which states, 'Candidate checks in 15 min early: ID verification, facial match.'
